title: godetia quadrivulnera var. flagellata
intro: Godetia quadrivulnera var. flagellata, also known as the desert godetia or flagellate godetia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the evening primrose family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. Its health benefits include treating wounds, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as acting as a natural remedy for digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
